actionable_feedback: Provide a machine-verifiable representation of the workbook so formulas and cell-level references can be inspected (see suggested formats below).
Add explicit, per-cell citations in the workbook that reference the source records (R1/R2/R3) for every derived total and remediation-parameter cell.

If available, include the missing control evidence (MFA coverage per admin edge and path-attribution showing which public triggers reach PII) or annotate the workbook with an evidence matrix linking edges/triggers to MFA/path status.
Avoid hidden sheets, external links, or embedded macros that could hide formula text; if present, document and expose them.

Include a short verification README (one-paragraph) describing where each critical formula lives (sheet name + cell range) and how to reproduce the memo's numbers programmatically (library and command).
